subtitle: Review reconstructed scope with confidence and evidence weakness left explicit.

sections.title: Highest-Confidence Framing
sections.label: Confidence
sections.why: Lead with the most evidence-backed framing before weaker inferences.

sections.title: Weak Scope Edges and Evidence Gaps
sections.label: Evidence Gaps
sections.why: Make weak or missing evidence impossible to miss.

sections.title: Personas and Success-Criteria Confidence Hotspots
sections.label: Hotspots
sections.why: Separate fragile actor or done assumptions from firmer claims.

sections.title: Decisions Required for Approval
sections.label: Decision Gate
sections.why: State what the reviewer must accept despite reconstruction uncertainty.

sections.title: Reconstruction Risks if Treated as Settled
sections.label: Risk Review
sections.why: Warn where inferred framing could mislead downstream artifacts.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie derived charter claims to exact repository evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show validation status for the derived artifact and approval view.

sections.title: Downstream Impact if Approved
sections.label: Impact
sections.why: Clarify what later reconstruction work may now treat as baseline.
